specialties.description: List of product categories the user specializes in

allOf.description: The monthly earnings goal for the seller

deliveryWindows.description: Set of time windows when the seller performs deliveries

name.description: The display name of the grower

localSourcingPercentage.description: Percentage of orders from sellers in the same city

earned.description: Total dollars earned for this produce item
